seoTitle: Whitfield vs Whittington — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Whitfield and Whittington. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Whitfield and Whittington.
heading: Whitfield vs Whittington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Whitfield, Victoria and Whittington, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Whittington has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Whitfield (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Whitfield or Whittington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Whitfield has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Whittington scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Whitfield scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Whittington scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Whitfield or Whittington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Whittington has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
